name: Mountain Run
description: Master the snowy peaks in Mountain Run! Sprint down an endless mountain, dodging trees and rocks while collecting coins. Unlock stylish outfits, experience dynamic seasons from Winter to Summer, and use power-ups like Magnets to boost your score. Features immersive 3D graphics, realistic running audio, and smooth controls. How far can you go in this high-speed adventure ?
instructions: Desktop - A Left Arrow Move Left - D Right Arrow Move Right - Space Up Arrow Jump Mobile - Tap Left Side Move Left - Tap Right Side Move Right - Tap with Two Fingers Jump
